title: Add lint indication that function has no return instead of internal error

features.name: function with return type but no return statement
features.description: Code should include a function declared with a non-void return type (e.g., integer) but with an empty body containing no return statement
features.snippet:
function integer log2m1 (input integer value);
endfunction

features.name: function call in constant expression for bit width
features.description: Code should include a function call used as part of a constant expression that defines a signal bit width, where the function returns an unknown/4-state value
